cross_module_findings.description: dental-org circular dependency on downstream modules for dashboard
dental-imaging imports dental-clinical schema + DB FK to dental_visit
dental-pmd bypasses facade — direct repo instantiation
dental-patient imports from 3 downstream modules — inverted dependency
dental-scheduling undocumented DB FK to dental_visit.id
SYSTEMIC: All 23 domain events (DE-001..023) never emitted anywhere in the codebase

fix_now_p0_critical: EX-006: Implement event bus — emit all 23 domain events
EM-ORG-003: Strip securityAnswerHash from listMembers response
EM-AUDIT-001: Fix role check admin → dentist_owner
UJ-IMG-002: Sanitize annotation text at read time (XSS)
UJ-IMG-007: Replace innerHTML with textContent for API errors (XSS)
EM-PMD-005: Replace sha256Hex charcode sum with node:crypto
TR-5B-003: Implement pg-boss consumer for dental-audit
TR-5A-003: Add baseline/proposed/completed layer to dental_chart
before_new_work: EM-PAT-005: Make branchId required in createDentalPatient
EM-VISIT-001: Add patientId filter to carryOverTreatments
EM-VISIT-003: Move assertBranchRole outside if(visit) guard
EM-PMD-004: Move authorization before fetch in getImportedPMD
UJ-SCHED-003: Fix edit modal to call updateAppointment

sections.reason: 11 of 13 present. Missing: Claims/Insurance (no MODULE_SPEC), Notifications (no dental-notifs module).

4.1 partial (audit consumer absent, chart layers absent). 4.2 partial (no recall E2E). 4.3 partial (_walkIn disabled). 4.4 covered. 4.5 partial (upload/annotation endpoints missing). 4.6 GAP (Cadence not activated).
9 confirmed orphan BRs. Most critical: CHART-BR-001/002/006 (P0), LF-BR-001/002, AUD-BR-004. CLAIM registry entirely unspecced.
Domain terms present but cross-module FKs on imaging_finding and pmd_document violate loose-coupling. dental_perio_tooth_reading missing 2 declared fields. Patient table diverges on consent fields.
Systemic permission gaps across 6 modules. admin vs dentist_owner mismatch in audit. staff_full locked out of billing. Role checks entirely absent in scheduling. Associate billing scope unenforced.
iPad-first baseline implemented. Chart layer separation (baseline/proposed/completed) ENTIRELY ABSENT — entryClassification is dead code. Navigation integrity broken in 3+ journey flows.
7/10 E2E journeys covered or partially covered. E2E-010 missing entirely. 6 carousel tests permanently skipped. imaging_finding FSM property test empty.
10 patient scenarios vs §10.1 requirement of 20+. GAP-007 comment in seed-demo.ts:466 confirms known gap. Missing: pediatric, orthodontic, full perio history scenarios.

reference_standard_alignment.overall: PARTIAL — 0 PASS, 6 PARTIAL, 1 GAP across 8 IDEAL sections

what_next.recommended_action: Stabilization sprint required. Route all engineering through /oli-enforce-fix prioritized by Fix Now list before any new features. P0 density (174 blockers, 9/11 modules NOT READY) prevents V1 ship.
